title: erigeron aureus
intro: Erigeron aureus, also known as golden fleabane, is a perennial plant belonging to the daisy family, native to North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antihistaminic properties. The health benefits of Erigeron aureus include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and alleviating allergy symptoms. Erigeron aureus can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, and its leaves and flowers can be used fresh or dried for medicinal purposes.
